# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: getambassador.io/v2
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: my-app
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service:
    name: my-service
    port: 80
  authorization:
    kind: ServerAuthorization
    allow:
      - namespace: "*"
        service: "*"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        - namespace: my-namespace
          service: my-service
    - to:
        - namespace: my-namespace
          service: my-service
      action: allow

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-server-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service:
    name: my-service
    port: 80
  allowedPrincipals:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: my-service-account
      namespace: my-namespace
